text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I just wanna run like I always do. C'mon...
please, just... move when I want you to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her hands clasped together as if in prayer,
Tamamo Cross rubs her legs in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Y-yeah! All good here. Check out these flexible legs—I'm more than ready!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No matter what happens, I'll break through. No
way am I goin' out there 'n makin' a fool of
myself. After all...
